summary: Comprehensive testing of PWA Mobile UI Polish & Advanced User Management features. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright. All APIs working correctly.

issues: Role dropdown selection requires force=True click due to modal overlay - works but could be smoother

critical_code_review_comments: Existing users (admin, can, service) created before full_name feature don't have full_name in DB - this is expected, new users get full_name correctly
Dialog components show console warning about missing Description - minor accessibility issue
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test users during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PWA Mobile UI Polish & Advanced User Management features verified working: 1) Boss can create users with Full Name + Username via Settings -> Add User dialog. 2) Full Name displays throughout app (login response, user list, profiles). 3) Boss can reset staff password via key icon in Settings. 4) Boss can change own password via Settings -> Change My Password. 5) Driver can change own password via Profile page. 6) CS can change own password via Profile page. 7) User Management shows Full Name + @username for users with full_name. 8) Delete user confirmation dialog works. 9) Self-delete protection works (Boss can't delete self). 10) Bottom nav has glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl) and safe-area-inset-bottom padding.

boss_create_user_with_fullname.description: Boss can create user with Full Name + Username
boss_create_user_with_fullname.verification: POST /api/auth/register with full_name field works, returns user with full_name

login_returns_fullname.verification: POST /api/auth/login returns user object with full_name

get_users_returns_fullname.verification: Users created with full_name have it in the response

boss_reset_password.description: Boss can reset staff member's password
boss_reset_password.verification: PUT /api/users/{id}/reset-password works, user can login with new password

boss_change_own_password.description: Boss can change own password via Settings
boss_change_own_password.verification: PUT /api/auth/password works with current_password and new_password

driver_change_own_password.description: Driver can change own password via Profile
driver_change_own_password.verification: Driver Profile has Change Password form with all required fields

cs_change_own_password.description: CS can change own password via Profile
cs_change_own_password.verification: Service Profile has Change Password form with all required fields

user_management_fullname_display.verification: Settings page shows full_name with @username below for users with full_name

delete_user_confirmation.verification: Delete button opens confirmation dialog with Cancel and Delete buttons

self_delete_protection.verification: DELETE /api/users/{boss_id} returns 400 with 'cannot delete your own account'

bottom_nav_safe_area.description: Bottom nav has safe area padding

reset_password_dialog.verification: Key icon opens dialog with password input and Reset Password button

password_validation.verification: API returns 400 for passwords shorter than 4 characters

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/login: PASSED - Returns access_token and user with full_name
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/register: PASSED - Creates user with full_name field
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/users/all: PASSED - Returns users with full_name field
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/users/{id}/reset-password: PASSED - Boss can reset any user's password
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/auth/password: PASSED - Any user can change their own password
api_endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/users/{id}: PASSED - Boss can delete users, self-delete protected
